name: demist
description: A spec-driven multi-API workbench: point it at any OpenAPI spec and get a humane GUI that always shows the raw HTTP.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @demist/server" "npm run dev -w @demist/web"
scripts.test: npm run test -w @demist/core && npm run test -w @demist/server
